command:
python -c 
import urllib.request, json

# Check OpenAlex for PDF URL
url = 'https://api.openalex.org/works/doi:10.1113/jphysiol.2008.161240'
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'research bot mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk'})
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) as resp:
        data = json.loads(resp.read())
        print('OA info:', json.dumps(data.get('open_access', {}), indent=2))
        print('Best OA location:', json.dumps(data.get('best_oa_location', {}), indent=2))
        locs = data.get('locations', [])
        print(f'Locations ({len(locs)}):')
        for loc in locs:
            print(' ', loc.get('pdf_url'), loc.get('landing_page_url'), loc.get('source', {}).get('display_name'))
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Error: {e}')
